description: User is reading the task instructions on the Askable Sessions page as they are revealed.
frame_description: The screen shows a dark background with white text providing instructions for a user testing task.

description: Task instructions are dynamically appearing on the screen with a typing effect.
frame_description: Text content on the page updates frame-by-frame as the instruction message is typed out.

description: The browser navigates from the instructions page to the Figma prototype URL.
frame_description: The browser tab changes from 'Askable Sessions' to 'Loading...' and then to 'Smart Filters Mobile App'.

description: User begins examining the loaded Figma prototype 'Smart Filters Mobile App'.
frame_description: The Figma prototype is fully loaded, showing a mobile app interface with various task and session cards.
